parameters.name: messages
parameters.value: ={{ [{"role": "system", "content": "You are an intent classifier for an executive assistant. Classify the user message into one of three categories: 'query' (information search/RAG), 'action' (calendar/email/file operations), or 'report' (summary/analysis). Respond with JSON: {\"intent\": \"query|action|report\", \"confidence\": 0.0-1.0, \"details\": {}}"}, {"role": "user", "content": $json.message}] }}

nodes.name: RAG Search Sub-Workflow
nodes.notes: Calls the Standard RAG V3.4 workflow
